overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an urban industrial drainage channel. The player emerges from under a concrete overpass into a sunlit area with power transmission towers and graffiti-covered buildings, then descends into a dark concrete tunnel.

events.description: emerging from under the concrete overpass into open industrial area
transition from shadow to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the drainage channel, moving from shadow under the overpass toward the open industrial area

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead creating deep shadow
tan concrete industrial building with blue structural accents
tall black metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple crossbars
wet concrete drainage channel with reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowy concrete drainage channel beneath a massive overpass. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the shelter into bright morning sunlight, revealing an industrial landscape with a large power transmission tower ahead and industrial buildings lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial drainage channel with power infrastructure

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the channel
passing close to green industrial building on left, temporarily blocking view of power tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the drainage channel, passing graffiti-covered walls and approaching a tunnel entrance in the distance

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near trash bags beside the green building

entered.detail: concrete wall with white graffiti including skull imagery and MAELSTROM text
multi-story green concrete building with broken windows and trash piled outside
large piles of blue and white garbage bags stacked against the building
elevated highway overpass with concrete supports spanning the channel
dark rectangular opening of concrete drainage tunnel ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open industrial drainage channel under clear morning skies. The camera passes close to a green industrial building with graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash bags, where a person sits against the wall. The massive power transmission tower dominates the center view while approaching a dark tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete drainage tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: entering the dark concrete tunnel from the open drainage channel
abrupt shift from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting inside tunnel

agents.ego_description: descending into and walking through a narrow dark concrete tunnel with water flowing on the ground

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete walls of the drainage tunnel with graffiti markings
matching concrete wall on right side creating narrow corridor
metal drainage grate embedded in the tunnel floor
small artificial lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark enclosed concrete tunnel, transitioning from bright outdoor light to dim artificial lighting. Walking through the narrow drainage corridor with water on the ground, passing metal grates and small ceiling lights while moving deeper into the tunnel system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowy underpass through a sunlit industrial corridor and finally into a dark subterranean tunnel. It begins in the dimness of a concrete drainage channel beneath a massive overpass, moving forward until it emerges into the bright morning sunlight of an open industrial landscape. As the camera advances under clear skies, it passes a green graffiti-covered building and piles of trash bags while a towering power transmission tower dominates the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a dark opening, transitioning from the brilliant outdoor light into the dim artificial glow of an enclosed concrete tunnel. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the narrow corridor, passing metal grates and ceiling lights over water-slicked ground.
